rows.command_eng: Every 5 minutes from 1 PM to 3 PM, repeat opening and closing the valve.
rows.candidates: ["{\"name\":\"Every5MinutesFrom1PMto3PMOpenAndCloseValve\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":0,\"code\":\"wait until ((#Clock).clock_hour == 13 and (#Clock).clock_minute == 0)\\nwait until ((#Clock).clock_hour == 15 and (#Clock).clock_minute == 0)\\nif ((#Clock).clock_hour == 13 and (#Clock).clock_minute == 0) {\\n    (#Valve).valve_open()\\n    delay(300 SEC)\\n    (#Valve).valve_close()\\n}\\nif ((#Clock).clock_hour == 15 and (#Clock).clock_minute == 0) {\\n    (#Valve).valve_open()\\n    delay(300 SEC)\\n    (#Valve).valve_close()\\n}\"}"]
